en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid VAT information in the Iceland VAT Registration Applicability Assessment questionnaire.

An activity or business operation must be reported to the Directorate of Internal Revenue no later than 8 days before the commencement of operations with registration in the register of employers and, as applicable, in the VAT register.
Please provide your VAT registration number issued from the Iceland Revenue and Customs agency.

The VAT registration certificate that shows the VAT registration number and confirms that the entity is registered in the Value Added Tax Register. A company can obtain its VAT registration certificate directly from Iceland Revenue and Customs agency via the VAT information and forms pages .
Please provide your VAT registration certificate issued from the Iceland Revenue and Customs agency.
